case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. DARIUS PITTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,569.00 FILED BY C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT PITTS, DARIUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 125.99 - SERVED JUL-02-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PITTS, DARIUS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-21-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DARIUS PITTS ON AUGUST 20, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
